schema_source: grande_finale.tex Work-Plan paragraph 'Rung audit' + conj:Q (\label{conj:Q}); packet-extension for experimental/data/certificates/frontier-adjacent/m31_mca_v1.packet.json (adds the sibling key conjQ_rung_audit at a NEW path; m31_mca_v1.packet.json itself is NOT modified). Sibling of experimental/data/certificates/frontier-adjacent/kb_mca_conjq_rung_audit_v1.json (PR #361): same compiler, M31 constants.
deliverable_name: conj:Q divisor-lattice rung audit at a0+1 (M31-MCA, v13 raw)

cross_refs.conj:Q: prefix flatness (grande_finale.tex \label{conj:Q}); THIS audit charges the quotient-pulled-back strata to their rungs, leaving conj:Q's primitive fiber as residual
cross_refs.conj:SP: primitive shift-pair control (\label{conj:SP}); not touched here
cross_refs.rem:proved-q-part: head-depth Q proved (1+o(1)) at w<=10-11 for M31 (rs_mca_proximity_prize_status.md Sec 2.3); the open case is the deployed frontier depth w=67447
cross_refs.prop:mode-null-false: raw null fiber not extremal (route cut) -- here the null target (j=21) is absorbed by the s<=3 ladder, no separate null hypothesis needed
cross_refs.kb_sibling: experimental/data/certificates/frontier-adjacent/kb_mca_conjq_rung_audit_v1.json (PR #361) -- same compiler, KB-MCA constants (v2(m_safe)=4, GREEN verdict); this M31 row diverges (v2(m_safe)=3, NOT GREEN -- pessimistic ladder exceeds K_raw)

row.D: chi(twin coset) on the norm-one torus U (order p'+1=2^31) -- NOT a multiplicative subgroup of F_p'^x
row.kind: MCA (mutual correlated agreement), circle/Mersenne-31 line round

target.K_raw_note: floor(B* p'^w / binom(n,m)); ambient integer multiplier cap for the safe-row Q-fin cell

divisor_lattice_note: n=2^21=M, so the divisor lattice of M is exactly the 2-adic tower 1|2|4|...|2^21 (j=0..21), identically to the KB row. Target stabilizer stratum j = v(z) = min_{i in I(z)} v2(i); nonzero strata j in {0..16}; j=17..20 EMPTY; j=21 all-zero. Subset-symmetry level s <= v2(m_safe)=3, so the ladder has 4 rungs s=0..3 (one fewer than KB's 5, since v2(m_safe)=3 here vs 4 there).

rungs.rung_verdict: RESIDUAL (this IS the primitive wall conj:Q; margin=0 by construction)
rungs.proof_obligation: OPEN (conj:Q at deployed depth w=67447; head-depth part PROVED, rem:proved-q-part)

rungs.rung_verdict: EXCEEDS budget (pessimistic same-bar bound; NOT a proof L_1 is false -- see companion note Sec 6-7)
rungs.proof_obligation: OPEN (L_1: max primitive-target fiber at quotient row (1048576,558012,33723) bounded by rho*avg with log2 rho <= 3.169925 = log2 K_raw -- the SAME flatness bar as the primitive row, at depth w/2^1; a REDUCTION in depth only. Pessimistic share at rho=K_raw already EXCEEDS K_raw alone (see companion note Sec 6-7); the row's standalone slack vs B* is informational, not the ladder threshold)

rungs.rung_verdict: EXCEEDS budget (pessimistic same-bar bound; NOT a proof L_2 is false -- see companion note Sec 6-7)
rungs.proof_obligation: OPEN (L_2: max primitive-target fiber at quotient row (524288,279006,16861) bounded by rho*avg with log2 rho <= 3.169925 = log2 K_raw -- the SAME flatness bar as the primitive row, at depth w/2^2; a REDUCTION in depth only. Pessimistic share at rho=K_raw already EXCEEDS K_raw alone (see companion note Sec 6-7); the row's standalone slack vs B* is informational, not the ladder threshold)

Pessimistic share at rho=K_raw already EXCEEDS K_raw alone (see companion note Sec 6-7); the row's standalone slack vs B* is informational, not the ladder threshold)

rungs.reason: 2^j does not divide m_safe (v2(m_safe)=3): NO scale-2^j-symmetric m_safe-subset exists
rungs.role: ABSORBED by rungs s<=3: every member has subset-symmetry s<=v2(m)=3, so this stratum's max fiber <= sum_{s=0}^{3} maxPi_s
rungs.rung_verdict: BELOW budget (no independent mass; covered by s<=3 ladder)
rungs.proof_obligation: covered by L_1..L_3 (+ conj:Q core); no new obligation

conjQ_rung_audit.rounding_policy: Because the three nonprimitive-rung pessimistic shares (s=1..3) are exact rationals whose sum is not an integer, the AGGREGATE nonprimitive charge is rounded CONSERVATIVELY -- charge = ceil(sum_{s=1}^{3} share_s), never floor -- so that the residual primitive budget quoted for conj:Q's core is never overstated; residual := K_raw - charge, and charge + residual == K_raw exactly by construction. Here this convention makes the reported deficit WORSE (more negative), which remains the conservative direction: a floor-rounded charge would UNDERSTATE the overshoot.

aggregate.verdict: NOT GREEN: the pessimistic same-bar ladder (rho_s<=K_raw at every nonprimitive rung) EXCEEDS the K_raw budget by a factor of ~4.667x (charge=42 vs K_raw=9). This is NOT a refutation of conj:Q and does NOT move the frontier edge -- no rung bound has actually been proven (L_1..L_3 remain OPEN); it is a certificate that the KB-style pessimistic rung-decomposition strategy does not close at this row (companion note Sec 5/7), confirming quantitatively that 'the Mersenne-31 rows, at ~3 bits, demand exact extremality' (rs_mca_proximity_prize_status.md).

reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.object: packet m31_mca_v1.packet.json .rung_margin_audit (Audit 1, LOWER-side periodic FLOORS Gfloor/Gceil/Rem/Plant vs Theta)
reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.its_verdict_full_ledger: GREEN, but computed at the OLDER pre-move pair (a0=1116021, a0+1=1116022), not the current moved pair
reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.its_verdict_current_moved_pair: only a single-rung spot check exists (v13_raw_moved_pair.tight_rung_at_a1p: profile Gceil, c=2048, margin -0.3938 bits, TIGHT, non-firing) -- not a full ledger at (1116023,1116024)
reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.relation: THIS audit is the complementary UPPER-side (conj:Q max-fiber) rung audit, computed at the CURRENT moved pair in full (j=0..21). The two are DISTINCT objects and must not be conflated. Both, on their own terms, land on the same qualitative conclusion for this row: TIGHT/not comfortably clear (unlike the KB row's clean GREEN on both sides).
reconciliation_with_periodic_floor_audit.no_refutation: Neither audit exhibits an actual firing or proved-exceeded bound at the current moved pair; the adjacent conjecture is NOT falsified by anything in this repo, and the edge does not (yet) move.

status: AUDIT (exact integer/rational arithmetic) for the descent identity and all margins; the per-rung max-fiber BOUNDS (L_1, L_2, L_3, conj:Q core) remain OPEN reductions. The pessimistic same-bar ladder EXCEEDS K_raw by ~4.67x -- NOT a refutation of conj:Q, see companion note Sec 5/7 for the exact, hedged statement.
